title: Glowing Enchanted Tools - Pink Extension
description: An unofficial extension that changes the enchantment glint to a smooth pink glow for a cleaner visual style.
body:
## **💗 Pink Enchant Glint (Unofficial Extension)**

**Pink Enchant Glint** is a refined visual enhancement created by **Fadi**, designed to subtly transform Minecraft’s enchanted item visuals. This pack replaces the default enchantment glint with a smooth, modern **pink glow**, creating a more elegant and immersive look that fits seamlessly into both vanilla and custom resource packs.

Inspired by the original [**Glowing Enchanted Tools**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools) by **@Sponcered**, this pack preserves the clean animated glint style while shifting its color from purple to pink. The result is a cooler, more striking visual effect that elevates the appearance of enchanted tools, all without altering the overall Minecraft aesthetic.

Whether you're exploring the deepest caves or battling on the surface, this subtle glow offers a fresh way to experience enchantment visuals without going overboard.



### ✨ Credits

* **Original Enchantment Glint Pack:** [Glowing Enchanted Tools by @Sponcered](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools)
* **Mace Model:** [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)



### 🧩 Compatibility

This pack is compatible with **Minecraft 1.21.5 and above**, and works well alongside most other visual resource packs. No OptiFine or mods required.


### 🌈 Other Colors:

* **🟡 Yellow Color:** [Yellow Extension]([https://modrinth.com/project/glowing-enchanted-tools-yellow-extension](https://modrinth.com/project/glowing-enchanted-tools-yellow-extension))
* **🔴 Red Color:** [Red Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools-red-extension)
* **🔵 Blue Color:** [Blue Extension]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools-blue-extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools-blue-extension))
* **🟠 Orange Color:** [Orange Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools-orange-extension)
* **🟢 Green Color:** [Green Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-enchanted-tools-green-extension)
